text: Your identity is defined by the actions you take, not the goals you set. Been back at the gym for a week and it's a daily reminder that discipline is what separates me from my excuses
decision_reason: Identity threat trigger used to challenge the audience's current mindset

text: We all struggle to get out of bed for that early morning gym session. But every rep is a step closer to our dreams. I'm on week 1 of getting back to the gym and it's a daily battle between pain and progress
decision_reason: Relatability gap trigger used to connect with the audience's shared struggles

text: Progress is not about being better than others, it's about being better than you were yesterday. Every gym session is a chance to reframe my mindset and push closer to my dreams
decision_reason: Reframe trigger used to shift the audience's perspective on progress and comparison
